title: If youre Shinji
wikitext:
[]: If you're Shinji             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 17, 2006 10:42 pm Let's imagine if you're Shinji in EoE. In the movie that little wimp wanted to die... So if, if you're Shinji, what would you do? Would you simply trigger the Third Impact and do what Seele wishes? If I'm Shinji, first of all I wouldn't go to Asuka's ward.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 17, 2006 10:47 pm Id go but their would be no mastrobation or acidental undressing

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Jul 17, 2006 11:08 pm I'd take unit 01 and annihalte those bastards attacking nerve and squish gendo. Then I'd blow up the eva series and go look for the old seele dudes. Of course they probably wouldnt be easy to find, but I'de have super unit 01 with the big giant wings on my side, no one could stop me! Not sure if I'de try to remake the world or not, if I did you could be sure it'd be more interesting then what Shinji ended up making.

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Tue Jul 18, 2006 1:18 am I would have done pretty much everything he did, except I would have let humanity be damned to that everlasting one-ness. Then destroy the world.

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Tue Jul 18, 2006 1:29 am I think I would have gone to a baseball stadium. And then robbed a bank.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Jul 18, 2006 2:19 am [url]http://video.google.ca/videoplay?docid=1897088569920380311&q=evangelion[/url] this should answer the question for me

[]:             Quote Post by xiuxiu » Tue Jul 18, 2006 2:37 am DatDude wrote: Id go but their would be no mastrobation or acidental undressing

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Tue Jul 18, 2006 2:47 am Actually why would Anno add that part to the movie? Give people an impression that Shinji was as sex-starved as James Bond?

[]:             Quote Post by Alfonso » Tue Jul 18, 2006 7:40 am If you were Shinji, then: -Your mother would be dead. -Your father hates you. -You generally haven't been popular with girls in your life. -You've come face to face with death on regular occassions. -You watched as your own father used your Unit to kill one of your best/only friends. -You've watched as one of your co-pilots, friend and object of your sexual desires breaks down mentally, and is mind-raped.# -You watch as one of your co-pilots, friend and possible 'mother figure' blows herself up. As far as you know, she's dead and gone. -...But then she comes back to life. -Then you find out she's a clone. -You kill one of the only people to tell you that they care for/love you, after finding out he's an enemy. -You realise that your main mother figure, guardian is going to die after being kissed by her and discovering blood in your mouth and hands. Yeah, I imagine after all that, not to mention the years of becoming isolated and possibly bitter before 2015, you're going to be up for kicking ass, taking names and generally 'rocking hardcore in Unit 01'. *rolls eyes*

[]:             Quote Post by PilotIkari » Tue Jul 18, 2006 9:19 am Frankly, I'm surprised Shinji didn't try and kill himself.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Tue Jul 18, 2006 10:21 am Hm, I'd realize I really had nothing left to loose...wait, nvm, there's still Asuka and Misato...hmm.. Well, I would pull Misato through the door thingy before she died. Then I would proceed to take her, into Unit01, and try to save Asuka, and kick the Harpie's asses some how. ^ The above is the single most plausible changes to EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Tue Jul 18, 2006 10:31 am i would save Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Tue Jul 18, 2006 10:44 am Misato entering Shinji's room in Episode 23 would have gone MUCH differently.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Jul 18, 2006 11:08 am PilotIkari wrote: Frankly, I'm surprised Shinji didn't try and kill himself.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jul 18, 2006 1:42 pm PilotIkari wrote: Frankly, I'm surprised Shinji didn't try and kill himself.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Tue Jul 18, 2006 1:59 pm I would have snapped by EoE so I would have probably gone mental and beat the shit out of anything that got in my way

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 18, 2006 3:08 pm If you're Shinji, you would do the same thing. The better question is, what would you want Shinji to do, or if it were you in Shinji's position, what would you have done. Personally, I think many people would have ended up in the same despondent position. One of your colleagues is killed and then revealed to be a clone of your mother. Your other colleage has gone catatonic. Your male role model has been killed for digging into a conspiracy. Your guardian and your father have all but abandoned you. One of your superiors has been imprisoned. Your closest friends was almost killed by the robot you pilot, which wouldn't ordinarily be so bad if you didn't have to feel the entire action as if you yourself were doing it. All your friends have left you because their homes were destroyed in order to save your life. And finally, you've been forced to kill the only person that accepted you and loved you for who you are. That's all in the span of a short period of time. You have no emotional support, no one to help you. What else are you going to do but break down. Your whole world has been torn apart. I don't envy Shinji's position, and I would never call him a whiner, because his character had his world destroyed piece by piece until he had nothing left.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 18, 2006 3:10 pm If I was Shinji in EoE, when Kaworu got real big and pink I would have juped out of my eva nd attach myself to Kaworu permanatly *nose bleed*

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 18, 2006 3:23 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: If I was Shinji in EoE, when Kaworu got real big and pink I would have juped out of my eva nd attach myself to Kaworu permanatly *nose bleed*

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 18, 2006 3:26 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: If I was Shinji in EoE, when Kaworu got real big and pink I would have juped out of my eva nd attach myself to Kaworu permanatly *nose bleed*
